hero.headline: I Build Complete Solutions With Multiple Skills
hero.subtitle: Khaled Ahmed Kamal | Full Stack Developer
hero.description: I combine backend expertise, database design, frontend capabilities, and strong communication to deliver complete solutions. Whether you need a full platform, API integrations, user-focused interfaces, or technical documentation—I bring all the skills to make it happen.

about.title: About Me
about.text1: I'm a Computer Science graduate from Assiut University (GPA: 3.44/4.00) who combines multiple technical and non-technical skills to deliver complete solutions. Instead of juggling different specialists, you get one trusted person who can handle backend development, database design, frontend work, system architecture, and clear communication—all from day one.
about.heading2: Why Hire Multiple People When One Has Multiple Skills?
about.text2: I consistently rank in the top 10% of programming competitions and have solved 1,300+ algorithmic problems. But beyond coding excellence, I understand that successful projects need versatility: API design AND user interfaces, database optimization AND clean architecture, technical documentation AND clear client communication. I bring all these skills together.
about.item1: Truly full-stack: backend systems, databases, frontend interfaces, all covered
about.item2: Faster timeline: no coordination delays between multiple contractors
about.item3: Consistent quality: one person's high standards throughout, not style variations
about.item4: Clear communication: direct contact with someone who understands every layer of your project

skills.title: Skills That Deliver Results
skills.description: I combine deep technical execution with strong delivery communication, so clients get quality implementation, clear progress visibility, and dependable outcomes.
skills.technicalDesc: The stack I use to design and ship robust backend solutions.
skills.nontechnicalDesc: How I collaborate, communicate, and keep projects moving smoothly.

project1.title: Team Space
project1.description: Comprehensive platform solving academic management challenges through integrated course management, auto-evaluated exams, live lectures, and real-time communication.
project1.problem: Managing academic activities manually caused delays, poor communication, and difficulty in handling large numbers of students.
project1.solution: Built an integrated platform for course management, online exams with auto-evaluation, live lectures, and real-time chat.

project2.title: Job Portal
project2.description: Unified digital hiring platform connecting companies and job seekers efficiently, enabling seamless job posting, application tracking, and opportunity management.
project2.problem: Many companies and job seekers struggled to connect efficiently due to the lack of a unified digital hiring platform.
project2.solution: Developed a web application where companies can post jobs and manage applications, while job seekers can search, apply, and track opportunities seamlessly.

project3.title: Examy
project3.description: Modern online examination platform with instant feedback, automatic grading, and comprehensive submission tracking for efficient assessment management.
project3.problem: Traditional exams lacked efficiency and immediate feedback, making it hard to manage large numbers of students.
project3.solution: Developed an online platform where students can take exams and instantly receive results, while instructors can track and review submissions effortlessly.

achievements.timeline1Desc: Helping 200+ students enhance problem-solving abilities, guiding through C++ fundamentals, and coaching competitive programming preparation

achievements.timeline3Desc: Ranked among top 15% of 200+ trainees with certificate of completion
